held_out_queries: Is there a portal to submit to ARS, or how do I propose a topic / get invited?
ARS is open access now — do I pay an APC, and how is the OA funded?
What's the word limit for an ARS review, and what criteria does the Editorial Committee judge on?

edits.summary: Quote the invitation-led intake model (Editorial Committees invite authors; no cold-submission portal), add the verified review bar (accuracy, rigor, and balance), correct the open-access description to Subscribe-to-Open (2023 commitment; 2024 all volumes OA; library/subscriber-funded, not an author APC), and REMOVE a previously-asserted ~8,000-12,000 word / ~20 page length figure that the source map explicitly declines to assert.
edits.gate_reason: strict improvement 56 -> 99; candidate also removed a fabricated word-count the baseline stated; volatile length/fee/editors left as live-check

result: arsoc-submission held-out 56 -> 99 (+43). A SkillOpt edit that both ADDED verified facts and DELETED an unverified over-assertion.
